title: Package Design, Modules, Versions, Workspaces, and Dependency Provenance · Execution Trace: Mod File Semantics
summary: A team must split a command and library, publish a stable module, test a two-module workspace, and review dependency changes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go mod file semantics increment in a versioned multi-package module plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret module, go, toolchain, require, replace, exclude, retract, and godebug directives without treating local overrides as releases.
Organize commands, internal packages, public packages, names, imports, cycles, and documentation around cohesive APIs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
